raw_consumer_statement: I have been disputing a transaction since XX/XX/year>. At one point during this time, a manager in the dispute department told me they could credit my account {$250.00}. I did not take the credit because the dispute was still open, and I had been told multiple times that there was a possibility that I would receive the full amount of {$1000.00} back to my account. I have been working with the executive office, and the latest representative told me she would do her best to give me the credit of {$250.00}. I received the resolution of only {$100.00}, which was added to my rewards account. The company should honor the {$250.00} that I was told I could get from a multi-billion-dollar corporation, and they can't afford to part with {$250.00} for a long-time customer who has never paid their bill late and spends a ton of money on their account. It is so completely frustrating to go through this process with a company that does not keep its word.
